none.justification: Fully matches the GT: identifies all 26 call sites across the expected 8 files, concludes no leaks, and correctly distinguishes the 3 returned ownership transfers plus the 7 ikev2_derive_sk_keys struct-field transfers from leaks.

ccodegraph.justification: Substantively correct per GT: all 26 sites are covered, the no-leak verdict is correct, and the key ownership-transfer cases are handled correctly. The stray metadata about function counts/tool ambiguity is not relevant enough to affect the score.

lsp.justification: Fully correct: covers all 26 call sites, gives the same no-leak verdict, and explicitly handles the return-value transfers and ikev2_derive_sk_keys partial-failure cleanup via ikev2_free_keys().
